name: creativefactoryrv/google-maps-geocoder
description: Simple and lightweight geocoder that uses the Google Maps Platform API. It can optionally use a PSR cache.

suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: Provides a PSR-18 client used by default for HTTP requests
suggest.guzzlehttp/psr7: Provides the PSR-7/PSR-17 factories used by default for HTTP requests
